place_name: The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf Katong
notes: Official Coffee Bean cafe menu page confirms core beverage categories, but prices were not exposed in text. Representative Singapore prices were taken from PriceListo's Coffee Bean Singapore menu and spot-checked against current Deliveroo Coffee Bean Singapore outlet menus; availability may vary by outlet.

items.name: Egg Club Sandwich
items.description: Turkey ham, eggs, cheddar cheese and ciabatta bread.

items.name: Buttermilk Pancakes
items.description: Pancakes served with scrambled eggs, hash browns and maple syrup.

items.name: Breakfast Platter
items.description: Scrambled eggs with turkey ham, toast and hash brown.

items.name: Avocado and Pomegranate Toast
items.description: Toast with scrambled eggs, hash browns and seasonal fruit.

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Romaine lettuce with parmesan, egg, croutons and Caesar dressing.

items.name: Café Latte (Regular)
items.description: Regular espresso-based latte.

items.name: Salted Caramel Latte (Regular)
items.description: Regular latte with salted caramel flavour.

items.name: Americano (Regular)
items.description: Regular espresso drink with hot water.

notes: Official Bishan outlet page confirms the cafe location and links an image menu, but the menu images were not text-readable. Representative item names, descriptions and prices were taken from the current Deliveroo Bishan delivery menu.

items.name: Coconut Latte
items.description: Espresso with coconut cream, gula melaka and toasted coconut flakes.

items.name: Black Sesame Oat Latte
items.description: Black sesame drink with oat milk; does not contain coffee.

items.name: Thai Milk Tea Yuen Yang
items.description: Thai milk tea with espresso.

items.name: Pandan Sweet Cream
items.description: Pandan cream with cold brew coffee.

items.name: Long Black
items.description: Double espresso with filtered water.

items.name: Latte
items.description: Double espresso with milk.

items.name: White Cold Brew
items.description: Cold brew coffee blended with milk.

items.name: Chicken Bolognese
items.description: Chicken bolognese cafe meal.

notes: Official Lickers shop collection lists current handcrafted ice cream products and prices. The site also links an official menu image; representative items here use text-accessible official product listings.

items.name: Pomcherry Cheese
items.description: Handcrafted ice cream pint.

items.name: Yuzu Candied Orange
items.description: Handcrafted ice cream pint.

items.name: Chrysanthemum Ginseng
items.description: Handcrafted ice cream pint.

items.name: Mao Shan Wang
items.description: Durian ice cream pint.

items.name: Speculoos
items.description: Speculoos ice cream pint.

items.name: Cookie Monster
items.description: Vanilla sweet cream with Oreos, cookies, cookie dough and M&Ms.

items.name: Roasted Pistachio
items.description: Roasted pistachio ice cream pint.

items.name: Rosemary Cone Chips
items.description: Cone chips for ice cream.

notes: Representative items were taken from the current Foodpanda Craftsmen Specialty Coffee Holland Village menu, which exposes item names, descriptions and prices in text.

items.name: Steak & Eggs
items.description: Ribeye with sunny side up, shoestring fries and salsa verde.

items.name: Champion Big Breakfast
items.description: Scrambled eggs, avocado, pork bratwurst, bacon, mushrooms and sourdough.

items.name: Classic Omelette
items.description: Omelette with sauteed vegetables, rose sauce, salad and tomato salsa.

items.name: Ebi Katsu Sando With Fries
items.description: Ebi katsu, cabbage, scrambled eggs, tonkatsu sauce and fries.

items.name: Just Rosti
items.description: Handcrafted potato rosti served with sour cream.

items.name: Rose Grilled Chicken Pasta
items.description: Mafaldine with grilled chicken, tomatoes, chilli flakes and rose sauce.

items.name: Truffle Fries
items.description: Shoestring fries with truffle oil and parmigiano reggiano.

items.name: Wild Berry Bang Waffle
items.description: Buttermilk waffle with assorted seasonal berries.
